# Cockpit → Control UI: Full 1:1 Consumption & Rebrand Spec > **Status**: Complete migration. The Cockpit **consumes** the built-in Control UI 1:1 — all abilities, settings, routes, and components — rebranded under Cockpit's oklch theme token system. > **Constraint**: NO new parallel implementations. Reuse Control UI source code directly. Rebrand only. --- ## 1. Executive Summary The Control UI is a full Gateway management dashboard embedded in the OpenClaw gateway. The Cockpit is a standalone static build. This spec mandates **complete consumption**: the Cockpit imports Control UI source modules directly, preserving all functionality while applying Cockpit's visual identity (oklch hue-cycling, dark-first, shadcn/ui primitives). **Golden Rule**: If the Control UI already does it, import it. Do not rewrite it. --- ## 2. Consumption Strategy ### 2.1 Source Code Location The Control UI source is in your cloned OpenClaw repository: ``` ~/.openclaw/ # Your fork: asherlewis-uk/openclaw ├── ui/ # Control UI React source (Vite + React) │ ├── src/ │ │ ├── components/ # Reusable UI components │ │ ├── routes/ # Page-level routes │ │ ├── stores/ # State management (Zustand/etc) │ │ ├── lib/ # Utilities, API clients │ │ ├── hooks/ # Custom React hooks │ │ └── styles/ # Theme, CSS, Tailwind │ ├── package.json │ └── vite.config.ts ├── src/ # Gateway server source │ └── (RPC handlers, config, cron, etc.) └── package.json # Root workspace config ``` **Key insight**: The `ui/` directory contains the **full Control UI source** — React components, stores, routes, and styles. This is what the Cockpit must consume. ### 2.2 Import Pattern (from cloned repo) ```typescript // CORRECT: Import from Control UI source in ~/.openclaw/ui/src import { useGatewayStore } from "@openclaw/ui/stores/gateway"; import { ConfigEditor } from "@openclaw/ui/components/config-editor"; import { CronManager } from "@openclaw/ui/routes/cron"; import { ThemeProvider } from "@openclaw/ui/stores/theme"; // WRONG: Create new parallel implementation // import { useGatewayClient } from "./lib/gateway-client"; // ❌ BANNED ``` ### 2.3 Rebranding Layer All imported Control UI components are **wrapped**, not forked: ```typescript // components/cockpit/rebranded/ import { ConfigEditor as BaseConfigEditor } from "@openclaw/ui/components/config-editor"; export function ConfigEditor(props) { return ( ); } ``` --- ## 3. Control UI Features → Cockpit Rebrand Mapping ### 3.1 Gateway Management (100% Consumed) | Control UI Feature | Source Path | Cockpit Rebrand | Status | |-------------------|-------------|-----------------|--------| | **Gateway WebSocket** | `ui/src/stores/gateway.ts` | Wrap with oklch connection status indicator | Consume | | **Config Editor** | `ui/src/components/config-editor.tsx` | Apply shadcn/ui form styling, oklch accents | Consume | | **Live Logs Tail** | `ui/src/routes/logs.tsx` | oklch log level colors (error=red hue, warn=orange) | Consume | | **Debug Panel** | `ui/src/routes/debug.tsx` | Dark panel with oklch syntax highlighting | Consume | | **Cron Jobs** | `ui/src/routes/cron.tsx` | shadcn/ui table + oklch status badges | Consume | | **Skills Manager** | `ui/src/routes/skills.tsx` | shadcn/ui cards + oklch enable/disable toggle | Consume | | **Nodes List** | `ui/src/routes/nodes.tsx` | oklch capability icons | Consume | | **Exec Approvals** | `ui/src/components/exec-approval.tsx` | oklch warning pulse for pending approvals | Consume | | **Channels** | `ui/src/routes/channels.tsx` | shadcn/ui tabs + oklch QR frame | Consume | | **Instances/Presence** | `ui/src/routes/instances.tsx` | oklch online/offline indicators | Consume | | **Sessions** | `ui/src/routes/sessions.tsx` | shadcn/ui dropdown + oklch override badges | Consume | | **Dreams/Diary** | `ui/src/routes/dreams.tsx` | oklch dream state animation | Consume | | **Update/Restart** | `ui/src/components/update-restart.tsx` | oklch progress spinner | Consume | ### 3.2 Chat Experience (100% Consumed) | Control UI Feature | Source Path | Cockpit Rebrand | Status | |-------------------|-------------|-----------------|--------| | **Server-Side Chat** | `ui/src/routes/chat.tsx` | Wrap with Cockpit message bubbles (oklch accents) | Consume | | **Slash Commands** | `ui/src/components/slash-commands.tsx` | oklch command palette styling | Consume | | **Tool Streaming** | `ui/src/components/tool-stream.tsx` | oklch tool cards with pulse animation | Consume | | **Voice/Talk** | `ui/src/routes/talk.tsx` | oklch mic waveform visualization | Consume | | **Model Picker** | `ui/src/components/model-picker.tsx` | shadcn/ui combobox + oklch provider icons | Consume | | **Context Usage** | `ui/src/components/context-usage.tsx` | oklch token pressure bar | Consume | | **Session Overrides** | `ui/src/components/session-overrides.tsx` | oklch toggle switches | Consume | | **Images** | `ui/src/components/image-gallery.tsx` | oklch image frame glow | Consume | ### 3.3 Settings & Preferences (100% Consumed) | Control UI Feature | Source Path | Cockpit Rebrand | Status | |-------------------|-------------|-----------------|--------| | **Theme Switching** | `ui/src/stores/theme.ts` | Map to oklch dark/light/system modes | Consume | | **Locale/i18n** | `ui/src/lib/i18n.ts` | Preserve 20 locales, oklch locale flag icons | Consume | | **PWA Manifest** | `ui/public/manifest.webmanifest` | Rebrand manifest, preserve service worker | Consume | | **Browser Profile** | `ui/src/components/profile.tsx` | Simplify + oklch avatar ring | Consume | | **Notification Settings** | `ui/src/components/notifications.tsx` | oklch notification bell pulse | Consume | --- ## 4. content.text:
# Cockpit → Control UI: Full 1:1 Consumption & Rebrand Spec

> **Status**: Complete migration. The Cockpit **consumes** the built-in Control UI 1:1 — all abilities, settings, routes, and components — rebranded under Cockpit's oklch theme token system.
> **Constraint**: NO new parallel implementations. Reuse Control UI source code directly. Rebrand only.

---

## 1. Executive Summary

The Control UI is a full Gateway management dashboard embedded in the OpenClaw gateway. The Cockpit is a standalone static build. This spec mandates **complete consumption**: the Cockpit imports Control UI source modules directly, preserving all functionality while applying Cockpit's visual identity (oklch hue-cycling, dark-first, shadcn/ui primitives).

**Golden Rule**: If the Control UI already does it, import it. Do not rewrite it.

---

## 2. Consumption Strategy

### 2.1 Source Code Location

The Control UI source is in your cloned OpenClaw repository:

```
~/.openclaw/                           # Your fork: asherlewis-uk/openclaw
├── ui/                                # Control UI React source (Vite + React)
│   ├── src/
│   │   ├── components/                # Reusable UI components
│   │   ├── routes/                    # Page-level routes
│   │   ├── stores/                    # State management (Zustand/etc)
│   │   ├── lib/                       # Utilities, API clients
│   │   ├── hooks/                     # Custom React hooks
│   │   └── styles/                    # Theme, CSS, Tailwind
│   ├── package.json
│   └── vite.config.ts
├── src/                               # Gateway server source
│   └── (RPC handlers, config, cron, etc.)
└── package.json                       # Root workspace config
```

**Key insight**: The `ui/` directory contains the **full Control UI source** — React components, stores, routes, and styles. This is what the Cockpit must consume.

### 2.2 Import Pattern (from cloned repo)

```typescript
// CORRECT: Import from Control UI source in ~/.openclaw/ui/src
import { useGatewayStore } from "@openclaw/ui/stores/gateway";
import { ConfigEditor } from "@openclaw/ui/components/config-editor";
import { CronManager } from "@openclaw/ui/routes/cron";
import { ThemeProvider } from "@openclaw/ui/stores/theme";

// WRONG: Create new parallel implementation

github.com/openclaw/openclaw

Not in your fork.
